title: Local Penumbra Mod Data
description: The locally stored data for an installed mod in Penumbra

FileVersion.description: Major version of the local data schema used.

FileSystemFolder.description: The containing folder in Penumbras custom filesystem for this mod. Can be omitted if the mod is not in a folder.

SortOrderName.description: The sort order name of the mod in Penumbras custom filesystem. Can be omitted if the mod uses the default sort order name.

ImportDate.description: The date and time of the installation of the mod as a Unix Epoch millisecond timestamp.

LastConfigEdit.description: The date and time of the last time the configuration for this mod was changed in any collection.

LocalTags.description: User-defined local tags for the mod.

Favorite.description: Whether the mod is favourited by the user.

PreferredChangedItems.description: Preferred items to list as the main item of a group.
